config.script:
'FormatPathWithCompName #include "50211"
'getCurrentUser #include "50203"
sub plug_dokument_podstawowe(byref pContainer,byval idDok) dim pDok : set pDok = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT,idDok)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Temat").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pDok.strTematDokum
if pDok.strNumDokObcy <> "" then #ifdef _SECURITY pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Rejestr").element.bold = true #else pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Nr. dok. obcego").element.bold = true #endif pTB.newcell.addtext pDok.strNumDokObcy end if
#ifdef _SECURITY pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Numer w segregatorze").element.bold = true #else pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Położenie").element.bold = true #endif pTB.newcell.addtext pDok.strLokalizacja
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Data wpłynięcia/wysłania").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext cstr(pDok.dDataWeWy)
#ifdef _SECURITY pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Data zawarcia umowy").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext cstr(pDok.dDataRejestracji) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Polecający klienta").element.bold = true #else pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Nadawca").element.bold = true #endif if not pDok.wpNadawca is nothing then pTB.newcell.addtexthli pDok.wpNadawca.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pDok.wpNadawca.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(pDok.wpNadawca.idobj)+"'") else pTB.newcell.addtext "<brak>" end if
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Adresat").element.bold = true if not pDok.wpAdresat is nothing then pTB.newcell.addtexthli pDok.wpAdresat.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pDok.wpAdresat.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(pDok.wpAdresat.idobj)+"'") else pTB.newcell.addtext "<brak>" end if #ifdef _SECURITY if not pDok.dok_pOpracowal is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Opracował").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pDok.dok_pOpracowal.text end if #endif end sub
sub plug_dokument_powiazania(byref pContainer,byval idDok)
dim pDok : set pDok = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT,idDok)
if not pDok.listLinks.exists(1) and pDok.pReplaces is nothing and pDok.pReplaced is nothing then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
if not pDok.pReplaces is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Zastępuje").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtexthli pDok.pReplaces.strTematDokum , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT' vn2='"+cstr(pDok.pReplaces.idobj)+"'") end if
if not pDok.pReplaced is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Zastąpiony przez").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtexthli pDok.pReplaced.strTematDokum , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT' vn2='"+cstr(pDok.pReplaced.idobj)+"'") end if
if pDok.listLinks.exists(1) then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Dokumenty powiązane").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_TABLE , -1
dim pTB_links:set pTB_links = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pTB.element) dim elem for each elem in pDok.listLinks pTB_links.newrow.newcell.addtexthli elem.pDokument.strTematDokum , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT' vn2='"+cstr(elem.pDokument.idobj)+"'") next
end if
pTB.newrow.newcell.cell.colspan = 2 pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON , -1 with pTB.element set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunction='linked_docs'") .text = "Odwołania z " end with
end sub
sub plug_dokument_streszczenie(byref pContainer,byval idDok) dim pDok : set pDok = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT,idDok)
if pDok.strStreszczenie="" then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX , -1 with pTB.element .value = pDok.strStreszczenie end with
end sub
sub plug_dokument_cechy(byref pContainer,byval idDok)
dim pDok : set pDok = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT,idDok)
if pDok.strCecha1="" and pDok.strCecha2="" and pDok.strCecha3="" then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
if pDok.strCecha1<> "" then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext " - " + pDok.strCecha1 end if if pDok.strCecha2<> "" then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext " - " + pDok.strCecha2 end if if pDok.strCecha3<> "" then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext " - " + pDok.strCecha3 end if
end sub
sub plug_dokument_wypozyczenie(byref pContainer,byval idDok)
dim pDok : set pDok = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT,idDok) dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Plik z dokumentem").element.bold = true if pDok.fPlik.isEmpty() then pTB.newcell.addtext "<brak pliku>" exit sub else pTB.newcell.addtext FormatPathWithCompName(pDok.strFileName) end if
if (not pDok.pUzytkWypoz is nothing) then pTB.newrow.newcell.cell.colspan=2 pTB.addtext "Plik jest wypożyczony przez """ + pDok.pUzytkWypoz.strNazwa + """ jako """ + _ FormatPathWithCompName(pDok.strCheckoutFileName) + """" end if
pTB.newrow.newcell.cell.colspan = 2 pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON , -1 with pTB.element set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunction='ss_view'") .text = "Podgląd" .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with
pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON , 505 with pTB.element set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunction='ss_edit'") .text = "Edycja" if (not pDok.pUzytkWypoz is nothing) then .disable=true else .disable=false end if .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with
pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON , 502 with pTB.element set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunction='ss_checkout'") .text = "Wypożycz" if (not pDok.pUzytkWypoz is nothing) then .disable=true else .disable=false end if .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with
pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON , 503 with pTB.element set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunction='ss_checkin'") .text = "Oddaj" if (not pDok.pUzytkWypoz is nothing) then .disable=false else .disable=true end if .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with
pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON , 504 with pTB.element set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunction='ss_undocheckout'") .text = "Anuluj wypożyczenie" if (not pDok.pUzytkWypoz is nothing) then .disable=false else .disable=true end if .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with
if (not pDok.pUzytkWypoz is nothing) then if (pDok.pUzytkWypoz.idobj<>getCurrentUserID()) then pTB.newrow.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON , 601 pTB.cell.colspan=2 with pTB.element set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunction='ss_sendnotify'") .text = "Powiadom wypożyczającego" .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with end if end if
end sub
sub plug_dokument_atrybuty(byref pContainer,byval idDok)
dim pDok : set pDok = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT,idDok)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 1 pPlugInTable.width = clng(MAXIMIZE_SIZE)
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
dim strTxt1 : strTxt1 = "" if pDok.dok_strUF1 = "1" then strTxt1 = strTxt1 + " RADIO " end if if pDok.dok_strUF2 = "1" then strTxt1 = strTxt1 + " GSM " end if if pDok.dok_strUF3 = "1" then strTxt1 = strTxt1 + " TELEFON " end if pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Opcje") pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) pTB.newcell.addtext strTxt1 #ifdef _SECURITY pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Zmiana stawki").newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.fulldate(pDok.dok_dtUF4) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Data rozwiązania").newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.fulldate(pDok.dok_dtUF5) #else pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Data podwyzki").newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.fulldate(pDok.dok_dtUF4) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Zmiana stawki").newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.fulldate(pDok.dok_dtUF5) #endif pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Wartosc umowy").newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(pDok.dok_curUF6,"")) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Okres platnosci").newcell.addtext pDok.dok_strUF8 #ifndef _SECURITY pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Okres gwarancji").newcell.addtext pDok.dok_strUF12 pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Typ centrali").newcell.addtext pDok.dok_strUF11 #endif if not pDok.dok_pUFPracKlient13 is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Osoba odpowiedzialna").newcell.addtext pDok.dok_pUFPracKlient13.text end if if not pDok.dok_pUFPracKlient14 is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Wlasciciel gl. kodu").newcell.addtext pDok.dok_pUFPracKlient14.text end if if not pDok.dok_pUFKlient15 is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Serwis obcy").newcell.addtext pDok.dok_pUFKlient15.text end if #ifndef _SECURITY pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Zmiany w systemie").newcell.addtext pDok.dok_strUF9 pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Serwisy").newcell.addtext pDok.dok_strUF10 #endif end sub
